title: Waveform
description: JM-18 audio waveform overview — the BYTES of the `waveform` derivative blob at /.juicemount/derivatives/<inode>/waveform.json (not a control-plane response). De-facto-standard BBC audiowaveform / waveform-data.js JSON so OpenLoupe and an off-the-shelf web renderer parse it identically. Lets a client skip a local PCM decode.

sample_rate.description: PCM sample rate the overview was computed at.

samples_per_pixel.description: Samples summarized per pixel column; spp/sample_rate = seconds per pixel (the time↔pixel mapping).

data.description: Flat interleaved min,max pairs per pixel, row-major by pixel then channel. data.length == length * 2 * channels; each consecutive (min,max) pair has min <= max; values within the bits range.
